item.title: Kosovo president dissolves parliament, calls snap election after failed presidential vote
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
March 6 - Kosovo's President Vjosa Osmani on Friday dissolved parliament and called snap elections after lawmakers failed to elect a new head of state within a constitutional deadline.
Matched: law(+3), parliament(+2), election(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Criticism of Trump mounts in the UAE as Iran barrage continues
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
A billionaire pointedly asks the US president: Who gave you the authority to drag us into a war?
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Cost to US for war on Iran is $3.7bn in first 100 hours, says think tank
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Most of the costs are not budgeted for, meaning the Pentagon will need to request more funding soon, researchers say.
Matched: budget(+3), war(+3), funding(+2)

item.title: Malaysia gearing up for 2026 polls, say sources; pundits cite opposition infighting and strong economy as reasons
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
Preparations are underway for a possible general election later this year, despite Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim previously ruling it out, party insiders and civil servants tell CNA.
Matched: war(+3), election(+2), economy(+2)

item.title: For Mexico's security chief, El Mencho killing was personal
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
MEXICO CITY, March 5 - Mexico’s security chief, the man who helped lead the operation that killed the drug lord known as “El Mencho,” spends his days and nights inside fortified office buildings, including a one-bedroom apartment in the security ministry built for him.
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Iran war chokes aid corridors, obstructing global relief efforts
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
GENEVA, March 6 - Key humanitarian air, sea and land routes are being constricted by disruption from the war in the Middle East, delaying life-saving shipments to some of the world's worst crises, 10 aid officials have told Reuters.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Israeli airstrikes pound Beirut suburb, Hezbollah warns Israelis
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
BEIRUT/JERUSALEM, March 6 - Israel carried out heavy airstrikes on the Hezbollah-controlled southern suburbs of Beirut overnight after ordering its residents to leave, while the Iran-backed group warned Israelis to leave towns and villages at the frontier.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Prediction markets face scrutiny after bets on Iran strikes raise insider trading concerns
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
But regulating the sector presents challenges, given the use of cryptocurrencies and support from US President Donald Trump’s administration.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Malaysia says approved investments hit record high of US$108 billion in 2025
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
A total of 8,390 projects were approved, with the potential of creating nearly 245,000 jobs for Malaysians, Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim said.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Two lawyers ordered to pay S$5,000 each in personal costs for citing AI-generated fictitious cases
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
The lead lawyer for a civil suit had roped in another solicitor to assist him, and this lawyer's paralegal purportedly inserted the fictitious cases into draft submissions.
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump finds he needs Europe now that he’s waging war in Iran
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Europe, though still heavily dependent on the US through institutions like NATO, retains leverage.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Democrats say Trump team fails to protect diplomats in Middle East
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Senators slam decision to order departures from only one embassy, in Lebanon, the week before the war.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Middle East war traps 20,000 seafarers, 15,000 cruise passengers in Gulf
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Oil tanker transits through the Strait had dropped by 90 per cent from last week.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iran targets Israeli embassy in Bahrain, Al Udeid airbase in Qatar
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Multiple Gulf nations, Arab states, as well as Turkiye and Azerbaijan are caught in the crosshairs of the war.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: ‘As dead as fried chicken’: Why Trump finally fired Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
President Trump grew angry after she told lawmakers he had personally approved an ad campaign when he had not.
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump urges Iranian Kurds to attack Iran as war widens
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Iranian Kurdish militias have consulted with the US in recent days.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Killing Iran’s leader, ‘appointing’ new one: Is everything fair in war?
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Almost nothing constrains a wartime US president, say analysts.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US states sue to stop Trump’s latest global tariffs
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Lawsuit is to stop the 10% tariffs that Trump immediately imposed after US Supreme Court struck down previous tariffs.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), economy(+2)

item.title: Jail for Malaysians who entered Singapore repeatedly to withdraw S$1 million in total for syndicate
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
The men received their assignments from a duty roster in a Telegram chat assigning people to Singapore to withdraw cash each week.
Matched: ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Tens of thousands in scramble for flights out of Middle East amid Iran war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Wealthy travellers are paying up to $200,000 to charter flights out of the region.
Matched: war(+3), economy(+2)

item.title: US grants temporary waiver for India to import Russian oil
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The move, which expires on April 4, reduces the impact on inflation in India and eases pressure on the rupee.
Matched: inflation(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Why did Trump fire Kristi Noem as DHS secretary; who is Markwayne Mullin?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Trump said Mullin will lead the Department of Homeland Security while Noem assigned as special envoy.
Matched: ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Justice Department releases FBI interviews in Epstein files with woman who made claims against Trump
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The Justice Department has cautioned that some of the documents include “untrue and sensationalist claims”.
Matched: ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Hezbollah warns Israeli residents to evacuate towns near border
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
March 6 - Lebanon's Hezbollah warned Israeli residents to evacuate towns within 5 km (3.11 miles) of the border between the countries in a message posted on its Telegram channel in Hebrew early on Friday.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)
